chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1433 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2017. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G alongwith SIP Muhammad Bux P.S Tando Bago, District Badin. The petitioner has alleged harassment against the private respondents against whom according to the learned Counsel for the petitioiner, the petitioner had filed a civil suit No.3/2017 for declaration and permanent injunction, which was later on withdrawn by him as the private respondents had given undertaking in his favour. Case of the petitioner is that still the same private respondents are causing harassment to him through the police officials. Learned A.A.G has filed the comments of respondents No.2 and 3 in which they have categorically stated that there is a dispute between the petitioner and private respondents over some plot in the village scheme, which is purely of a civil nature. Further they have vehemently denied the allegations of causing harassment to the petitioner. The petitioner before us has not produced any proof showing the official respondents have caused harassment to him. There is a civil dispute between the parties and the petitioner has unsuccessfully tried to convert said civil dispute into his complaint of harassment against the police officials. We, therefore, are of the view that this petition is devoid of merits and is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
